title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleNative: 追放令嬢、クラフトしながらキャンピングカーで異世界を旅します
synonyms: The Exiled Lady Travels to Another World in a Camper Van While Crafting
synopsis: Riding in a camper, eating delicious food, and enjoying the spectacular view. Saori Furuki was a university student in the engineering department and loved making things. After a car accident, she is reborn as Eline, the daughter of a viscount, However, her family treats her coldly, saying that she is incompetent and can only use magic to produce items, and she is exiled from the country. However, Eline's “alchemy magic” is a magic that has unlimited possibilities when combined with the knowledge from her previous life! Determined to live freely from now on, Eline has created a camper for starters. She can move around, live, and make things as she pleases. Together with Aristy, a martial maid who adores Eline, she begins her adventurous journey with a sense of ease. Eating delicious food, admiring the spectacular scenery, and creating useful things. This is a travel story about riding in a camper and enjoying another world with elegance. (Source: SB Creative, translated)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

chapterSourceTitle: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai o Tabishimasu

title: The Temp Worker And The Career Woman
titleEnglish: The Temp Worker And The Career Woman
titleNative: 派遣とバリキャリ
synopsis: Having given up on marriage, a 38-year-old career woman contemplates purchasing an apartment. She is filled with envy when one day a new, cute, 21-year-old temp worker is hired by her department. The career woman is taken aback by the temp's aggressive forwardness, and the two are pulled closer together in an unexpected twist. (Source: Taiyohtosho)

title: Kikkai-kun
titleNative: キッカイくん
synopsis: Maka Kikkai is an elementary school student who calls himself a handsome boy on the cutting edge of scientific civilization. He tries to live a comfortable and convenient life with the help of his tutor Mashin Hakase's, and his father's inventions, but he always fails and causes a big ruckus. Note: Chapter and volume count is based on the 1973 Sun Comics edition which was the first complete compilation of the series

title: Shogun
titleNative: ショーグン
synopsis: The story starts with Ogata Shinsaku, a homeless 17-year-old boy who was disowned by his father and head of a major company, Tatsumi Takaaki. One day, an old man appears and gives Shinsaku 100 million yen, urging him to use it as he sees fit, so he starts his own company to fight against his father's business empire.

title: Open Car Girls
titleNative: オープンカー・ガールズ
synopsis: Otome Kito, a new college student, had vague dreams of “wanting to try something new.” Just then, a sleek, eye-catching car zooms past her, a crimson-red roadster! The driver is Yae Zensan, a car-lover. After being swept up by Yae's passionate appeal, Otome ended up purchasing a pure white Copen! With her new convertible, an exciting, vibrant college life is about to begin! (Source: Yanmaga, translated)

title: Countach
titleNative: カウンタック
synopsis: The day after he finds himself dumped by his girlfriend, Sorayama Shun recieves a letter... from himself? The letter was from Shun 25 years ago for his future self. The letter reminds him of the time when he dreamed of owning a Countach and being a successful professional racer. With loads of luck and his ambition to make his childhood dream come true, he finds himself as a new owner of an LP400 Countach.

Hakanagi Kasumi, Who ×× Right Away When I’m Not Around
synopsis: In the spring of his first year of high school, Michiko Takase decided that "school life will not work hard." However, the seat next to it was a female student full of “suspicious rumors” and takugi (Hakanagi) Kasumi! Michiru tries to keep a distance while wearing a bandage on the eye band, but the two are in a relationship of "compensating" from chance ...!? It's hilarious, but I'm going to do my best! Zako Kawa ♡ Youth watching love comedy with heroine! ! ! ! (Source: Hero's, translated)

title: Shy
titleNative: シャイ
synopsis: Earth was on the brink of a third World War when super-powered individuals came forth from each country around the globe, ending the conflict and ushering in a new era of relative peace. Among those heroes, Japan is represented by a timid young girl known as “Shy.” She may spend more time worrying about her own shortcomings than she does battling villains, but she’ll show the world that despite it all she still has the heart of a hero! (Source: Yen Press) Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.
synonyms: ฮีโร่ขี้อาย หัวใจไฟเตอร์

title: Imouto wa Shitteiru
titleNative: 妹は知っている
synopsis: At work, Kiichiro Miki is an ordinary salaryman who is considered expressionless and dull by his co-workers. He floats around at drinking parties and doesn't seem to be having any fun at all. But only I, his younger sister, knows the truth about him. My brother is actually “the most interesting man in the world." (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: My Wandering Warrior Existence
titleNative: 迷走戦士・永田カビ
synonyms: Diario di una guerriera single - Il mio matrimonio con me stessa
synopsis: The newest diary manga from the Harvey Award-winning creator of My Lesbian Experience with Loneliness. Nagata Kabi’s groundbreaking autobiographical work has captivated audiences around the globe, starting with the viral online comic about identity that would become the graphic novel My Lesbian Experience with Loneliness . Readers from all backgrounds have been moved by the author’s ability to capture complex emotions through her art and text, giving insight into feelings they may have struggled to articulate themselves. Nagata Kabi’s memoirs, including the Eisner-nominated My Solo Exchange Diary and new release My Alcoholic Escape From Reality , have explored themes of physical and mental illness, sex and sexuality, family, and independence. Follow the newest installment of this trailblazing series with My Wandering Warrior Existence , Nagata Kabi’s exploration of longing for love and marriage. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

titleNative: 너만 보인단 말이야
synonyms: You’re the Only One I Can See
synopsis: Following the advice of his imaginary friend Jason, who told him, "Treat all girls like stones," Park Jin-yong starts seeing every girl as a stone. But then Sunwoo, a female student who doesn’t look like a stone, appears before him, and for the first time in five years, the sight of a girl’s face sends Jinyong’s happy little circuits into overdrive... (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Tuojiang
titleNative: 脱缰
synonyms: เอาตัวรอดจากรัชทายาทคลั่งรัก
synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: The War of Greedy Witches
titleRomaji: Majo Taisen: 32-nin no Isai no Majo wa Koroshiau
titleNative: 魔女大戦 32人の異才の魔女は殺し合う
synonyms: มหาสงคราม 32 แม่มด
Witches war: La gran guerra entre brujas
synopsis: Joan of Arc, the hero who saved France, was sentenced to be burned at the stake. But at the moment of her death, a demon sent her to another world. There, she found 32 women from across history, known as “witches.” With the addition of the final witch, Joan of Arc, Walpurgis Night begins: Only one witch can survive, and have her wish granted! (Source: Comikey)
